summary: Full-stack review of Okul Öncesi Eğitim Yönetim Sistemi. Wrote pytest suite (25 tests, 100% pass) covering auth, class-settings, students CRUD + teacher isolation, reports (8-section draft shell), and dashboard; _id leakage and 401 enforcement verified on every protected endpoint. Frontend E2E in Playwright: login page, session-cookie injection, dashboard with stats + schedule, student create (toast + detail render), reports form, settings save-and-persist, logout, and /dashboard→/setup redirect for setup_completed=false (wizard steps 1→2 navigated; final setup completed, dashboard reflected new school_name and schedule). All critical flows work.

minor.issue: Real Google OAuth exchange untestable (mocked/skipped). Endpoint correctly returns 401 for invalid session_id, which is all we can verify without a real Google session.

issues: Uses browser-native date inputs showing 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder instead of a styled shadcn calendar picker. Functionally works but inconsistent with rest of UI and confusing locale-wise for Turkish users. Consider shadcn Calendar/Popover.
Decorative background layer causes some console ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED for external resources (fonts/analytics) — cosmetic, doesn't break app.

action_items: (Optional) Replace native <input type="date"> in Reports page with shadcn Calendar component for design consistency.
(Optional) Fix minor Setup step-3 navigation race — after step-2 Next click, step-3 appears correctly only after animation completes; functional but worth a visual wait state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 500-line file handling auth/students/reports/dashboard; consider splitting into routers (auth.py, students.py, reports.py) as it grows.
datetime.utcnow() is not used — good. All timestamps use timezone-aware datetime.now(timezone.utc).
All Mongo queries correctly project {_id: 0}; verified in tests — no _id leaks.
Teacher isolation correctly enforced on GET/PUT/DELETE /students/:id and POST /reports/draft (verified with cross-teacher test).
StudentUpdate PUT: sets updated_at even when no other fields change (acceptable).
Pydantic models use Literal for enum validation — good.
Frontend: AuthContext correctly skips /auth/me when hash contains session_id (OAuth callback) — handled.
Minor: /api/auth/session cookie uses SameSite=None; Secure — correct for cross-domain Emergent preview.
Minor: no pagination on /api/students or /api/reports (limit 1000/500 hardcoded). Fine for MVP but should add cursor pagination later.

success_rate.frontend: 100% core flows (login render, dashboard, students CRUD, reports form, settings save, logout, setup redirect)

test_credentials: Created via mongosh per /app/memory/test_credentials.md — TEST_-prefixed users & sessions injected directly. All cleaned up after tests.
seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_ prefixed users, sessions, students, and report drafts during tests. All removed in fixture teardown + final mongosh cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py with conftest that injects test users directly into MongoDB. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Auth bypass uses Authorization: Bearer <session_token>; cookie-based auth also works. For UI, inject cookie with sameSite='None', secure=True, httpOnly=True on domain class-manager-183.preview.emergentagent.com. All data-testids in place; refer to grep output in my session.
rca of the issue: No blocking bugs found. One timing race in Setup wizard step-3 detection was a test-script issue, not product bug — flow completed successfully with dashboard reflecting new school name and schedule.
